title: centaurium minus var. pienicicum
intro: Centaurium minus var. pienicicum, also known as Kalmus or mountain bluet, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the gentian family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Centaurium minus var. pienicicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Centaurium minus var. pienicicum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat digestive problems and other health issues.
